creator: freebsd-bug-report-yf@yf.bsdclub.org
text:
Please check if the font installed from the port or package can be used correctly from X clients like kterm.

$ xset +fp /usr/local/share/fonts/misc
$ kterm kterm -fn -hiro-fixed-medium-r-normal--8-70-75-75-c-40-iso8859-1 -fr -hiro-fixed-medium-r-normal--8-70-75-75-c-40-jisx0201.1976-0 -fk -elisa100-fixed-medium-r-normal--8-70-75-75-c-80-jisx0208.1983-0 &
